channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: TypeScript patterns that cut bugs by 60% in 3 months
item.description: Cut production bugs by 62% and rollbacks by 75% with TypeScript branded types, per-service validation, and enforced immutability — measurement steps included for Jakarta and Dublin teams.

item.title: 12 best AI agents in 2025 ranked by real use cases
item.description: Cut agent development time by 60% with 12 production-ready AI agent frameworks ranked by real use cases — latency, cost, and failure rate benchmarks included for Lagos, London, Manila, and Montreal teams.

item.title: Top-down vs Bottom-up: Two Ways to Read Code
item.description: Cut new-hire onboarding time by 60% with a top-down code reading strategy — architecture maps, READMEs, and the mistakes that waste days debugging legacy code.

item.title: Supabase in Production: One Query to Rule Them All
item.description: pike from 12% to 87% when the pool tipped o with Supabase Production One Query — Supabase and watched our p95 latency jump from 32ms.

item.title: Why Event-Driven Architecture Fails with Duplicate Events (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut duplicate event processing by 99.8% in production with idempotency keys, Redis, and Kafka EOS — real fixes with metrics, code, and escalation paths for event-driven systems under load.

item.title: Low-Code Platforms Are Killing Your Career (Here’s Why)
item.description: Cut low-code app response time from 5.8s to 200ms by replacing auto-generated queries and self-hosting the backend — specific fixes for Retool, Appsmith, and Power Apps plus verification metrics and CI budgets.

item.title: We monitored our app before users complained — here’s what worked
item.description: Cut user-reported issues by 88% with proactive monitoring — Prometheus alerts, synthetic checks, and a focus on user flows instead of infrastructure metrics

item.title: Run your own AI assistant for under $5/month — the real stack
item.description: AI assistant under month: if CPU > 80% for 30 seconds, preventing ca. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: The 9 open-source projects that banked millions (and what you can learn)
item.description: Cut infra costs 40 % and slash build times 80 % with these 9 open-source projects that scaled to millions in revenue while remaining free to use. Real benchmarks, failure modes, and deployment scripts included.

item.title: Push Notifications Are Broken — Here’s How to Fix Them
item.description: Reduce duplicate push notifications by 80% with event-based delivery, Redis deduplication, and minimal payloads — measured on 2 fintech and healthtech apps with 1.2M+ users. Push notifications done right

item.title: WhatsApp scaled to 1M users on $50/month servers in 2013
item.description: Reduce your messaging server bill by 98% and hit 1M concurrent connections with Erlang, SQLite, and WebSocket on a $50/month VPS — the stack WhatsApp used before their $19B exit.

item.title: Go, Scala, and Rust topped 2026 paychecks — here’s why
item.description: Cut cloud costs by 44% and engineering payroll by 17% by migrating from Node to Go and Scala — concrete latency, cost, and salary numbers for 2026’s highest-paying languages.

item.title: How we cut incident costs 70% with real-time APM
item.description: Cut incident response time by 78% and saved $15k/month with real-time APM—OpenTelemetry, anomaly detection, and synthetic monitoring that prevent outages before users notice. Includes code, benchmarks, and pitfalls.

item.title: 2026 Stack Showdown: Ruby on Rails vs Next.js for Bootstrapped Startups
item.description: Cut cloud costs by 63% and ship twice as fast: compare Rails 8 vs Next.js 15 for bootstrapped startups in 2026. Real benchmarks, concrete numbers, and the mistakes that cost weeks of runway.

item.title: App crashes after Android 15 upgrade: why X fails with Y
item.description: Cut ANR crash rate by 95% after Android 15 upgrade — exact alarm permissions, WorkManager fixes, and Samsung-specific enforcement for apps targeting API 35, with budget tiers and CI checks to prevent regressions

item.title: CDN vs Local Cache: Which cuts latency for your API?
item.description: Cut API latency by 88–97 % with CDN vs local cache — real benchmarks, bandwidth costs, and the cache stampede mistakes that break both under load.

item.title: Pair Programming: When It’s Worth It in 2024
item.description: Reduce bug escape rate by 61% and cut time to resolution by 68% by pairing on small features for 30 minutes. Learn when pair programming is worth it and how to start with Python and Node.js examples.

item.title: Why Rust, Go, and Zig paid 30% more in 2026
item.description: Cut cloud costs by 77% by switching from Python and Node.js to Rust, Zig, and Go in 2026 — benchmarks, memory leaks, and the languages that paid off most

item.title: Remote beats office for dev velocity: here’s the raw data from 3M builds
item.description: Cut build time by 66% with remote runners: 4m 12s local vs 1m 22s remote, plus MTTR drops 12% and energy use falls 93% — real data from 14 months and 1M builds.

item.title: Why your phone now knows who you’ll argue with next
item.description: Cut notification fatigue by 68% with a real-time social graph that respects attention budgets — 3.8 alerts/day, $40/month stack, and the failure modes that break the promise of tech changing human relationships.
